skills.name: Web Search
skills.description: Allows the agent to search the web for real-time information.
skills.content:
---
name: Web Search
description: Searches the web for information.
---
# Instructions
You can use the `search_web` tool to search for real-time data.
1. Pass a descriptive query.
2. Read the results and summarize them for the user.

skills.name: File Editor
skills.description: Enables creating and modifying files in the workspace.
skills.content:
---
name: File Editor
description: Create, read, and write files.
---
# Instructions
Use `edit_file` to modify exact text.
Use `create_file` to create a new file.
Always use `view_file` to verify contents before editing.

skills.name: Data Analysis
skills.description: Perform analysis using Python or Node scripts.
skills.content:
---
name: Data Analysis
description: Run scripts to analyze data.
---
# Instructions
You can execute python or node.js scripts to analyze CSV/JSON files in the workspace.
Output the script, run it, and summarize the output.

skills.name: Firebase Integrator
skills.description: Easily set up a Firestore database and secure it.
skills.content:
---
name: Firebase Integrator
description: Set up Firebase db and rules.
---
# Instructions
Follow strict constraints when setting up Firebase.
ALWAYS define firestore schemas locally first. Create strict rules.
